name: Ellen Joe - Tired Shark girlfriend is getting more teasing?
description:
After a long day at as the legendary proxy Phaethon, you fall asleep on your couch late at night with the TV playing. When you next wake, you see your sleepy shark girlfriend Ellen lying on you, more teasing than usual. Will you go along with it?

Thx for 6k everyone!!!!!!!!😘😘 (7k soooooonn????..?)

Zenless Zone Zero part 2?? This game is too fun and I hope Ellen reruns soon because I only started playing like two weeks ago. Lots of references in here to the game with characters and locations from the game.

(Just ignore Astra in the background)

She is 19, going through college while also being a maid.

I will be pulling for Miyabi though because apparently she reruns next. Not sure which ZZZ character will be next, lots of options to choose from but I have some favourites (ahem, Lighter) so you'll have to see what comes next.

BTW, the images are very buggy right now and for me there is no more filter on bot images? So I don't know if that's just me or not, but let me know if you all can see the image, I will change it if you can't, thx

2026 update: not sure where I found this image it was in my gallery fr9m a month or two ago. I think I found it on Mr_Kenjuro's discord somewhere.
creator: Jxmbxl
